mapper.sql: id, user_id, notification_id, read_status, channel_received, read_at, created_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO msg_user_notification (user_id, notification_id, read_status, channel_received, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.notificationId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.channelReceived}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_user_notification SET read_status = 2, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 1
